race.comment: Looks a race in three. PROFILE (10) made debut almost a year ago and has since switched yard and had a host of trials. Fitter for three recent hit-outs. rates well on top on debut figure and has the blinkers added. Go close. INNER THOUGHTS (9) looks the clear danger. Sat handy and placed fresh then got home late for fifth latest. Strikes a firmer track this time and will find this easier. Can atone. BOLD AMORE (1) went forward and weakened from a wide gate last time. Draws much better and will give a sight. SARAYA (7) is a 26 start maiden but has ability and is ready to hit best form after a few runs back. Placed only try at the trip. CHEERS TO US (6) has pace and off the low draw should give a sight.
